attacking_style: Prefers long-range breakaway moves rather than late explosive attacks, excelling on sustained steep gradients (11%+) where he can drop companions before easier terrain allows regrouping. Will attack before summit to maximize time gains on descents.
team_tactics: Often isolated in breakaways without strong team support; relies on individual tactical intelligence rather than domestique-led setups. When paired with teammates (e.g., Rossetto), separation on climbs has undermined two-man tactics.
terrain_preference: Strongest on sustained steep climbs (11%+ gradients) where power-to-weight ratio decisive. Vulnerable on cobbled/punchy finishes and moderate gradients where punchier riders can respond. Comfortable using descents to defend gaps.
vulnerability: Struggles on cobbled/punchy finishes lacking explosiveness. Can be conservative in winning positions, playing tactical games rather than committing early. Less effective when gradients ease after initial steep attacks.
key_patterns: Multiple breakaway successes through superior race-reading and positioning, not pure power (2018, 2021)
Strongest on steepest 11%+ gradients but gets caught when terrain moderates (2019, 2018)
Attacks before summit to exploit descending skills for time defense (2018 Vuelta win)
Can be overly tactical/conservative from winning positions rather than committing (2023, 2021)
Consistent late-race animation and breakaway participation; labeled 'never tiring' (2017, multiple appearances)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed tactical conservatism from strong position; 2021 breakthrough as maglia rosa at age 34 suggests maintained endurance but recent evidence of tactical overthinking rather than declining physical capacity
